sections.paragraph:
ὑπέρμαχος, ου, ὁ champion, defender (Archias [I b.c.]: Anth. Pal. 7, 147, 1; IKret I, xix 3, 29 [II b.c.]; LXX, Philo) of God (2 Macc 14:34; Philo, Abr. 232; SibOr 3, 709) 1 Cl 45:7.—DELG s.v. μάχομαι.

IKret IKret = Inscriptiones Creticae—List 3

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

SibOr SibOr = Oracula Sibyllina, II–III a.d.—List 5

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1033
